Table FACT_USER_PERSONA_ASSIGNMENT

Card of table FACT_USER_PERSONA_ASSIGNMENT

Name

FACT_USER_PERSONA_ASSIGNMENT

Code

FACT_USER_PERSONA_ASSIGNMENT

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table FACT_USER_PERSONA_ASSIGNMENT

BRIDGE TABLE having users associated with each persona.

 

No RLS as this table is a dictionary

Historization: SCD1

Load type: DELTA

 

VALID_FROM - 1900-01-01 00:00:00

 

Logic:

 

select MD5(ATLAN_PERSONA_NAME_BK+VALID_FROM) as DIM_ATLAN_PERSONA_KEY ,

MD5(ATLAN_USERNAME_BK, VALID_FROM) as DIM_ATLAN_USER_KEY

from

 

(

SELECT DISTINCT

PERSONA_NAME as ATLAN_PERSONA_NAME_BK,

TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) AS ATLAN_USERNAME_BK

FROM (

SELECT

PERSONA_NAME,

REPLACE(USERS, '\n', ',') AS USERS_REPLACED

FROM (

SELECT DISTINCT PERSONA_NAME, USERS

FROM T_ATLAN_ADMIN_EXPORT_PERSONAS

WHERE USERS IS NOT NULL

)

) AS BASE,

LATERAL SPLIT_TO_TABLE(BASE.USERS_REPLACED, ',') AS SPLIT

WHERE TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) != ''

ORDER BY PERSONA_NAME, USERNAME)


Check constraint name of the table FACT_USER_PERSONA_ASSIGNMENT

CKT_FACT_USER_PERSONA_ASSIGNME


Server validation rule of the table FACT_USER_PERSONA_ASSIGNMENT

%RULES%


Code preview of the table FACT_USER_PERSONA_ASSIGNMENT

drop table FACT_USER_PERSONA_ASSIGNMENT cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: FACT_USER_PERSONA_ASSIGNMENT
--==============================================================
create or replace table FACT_USER_PERSONA_ASSIGNMENT (
DIM_PERSONA_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
DIM_USER_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
constraint PK_FACT_USER_PERSONA_ASSIGNMEN primary key (DIM_PERSONA_KEY, DIM_USER_KEY)
not enforced
);

alter table FACT_USER_PERSONA_ASSIGNMENT set comment = 'Factless fact table created to show the users in an Atlan Persona';

comment on column FACT_USER_PERSONA_ASSIGNMENT.DIM_PERSONA_KEY is
'Dimension key identifying each unique Persona';

comment on column FACT_USER_PERSONA_ASSIGNMENT.DIM_USER_KEY is
'Dimension key identifying each unique user';
